Privacy Policy

Effective date: February 12, 2026

Last updated: February 12, 2026

1. Core Position

TinyHumanMD is a clinical decision-support reference interface, not a healthcare provider, not an emergency service, not an EHR, not a claims system, and not a regulated patient charting platform. You remain solely responsible for legal compliance, institutional policy compliance, and all downstream decisions made from any site output.

2. No Account Reliance

TinyHumanMD is designed for access without mandatory account creation. You must not treat this site as a long-term repository for medical records, patient communications, or regulated archival obligations. Your own systems and institution remain responsible for those duties.

3. User Responsibility

You are responsible for all values entered, all interpretation of outputs, all transmission choices, and all endpoint controls. If you are not authorized or qualified to process information, do not use this site for those workflows.

4. Legal Boundaries

To the maximum extent permitted by law, this policy defines operational boundaries and risk allocation but does not create any additional fiduciary or professional obligations beyond applicable law.

Annex P-1

This Annex P-1 clarifies local endpoint security, access control, and device hardening. TinyHumanMD is provided for decision-support reference use only. Users, organizations, and operators of clinical environments must independently verify all information against current official references, local policy, and professional standards before implementation. No statement in this site creates a patient-provider relationship, a legal duty of care, or a contractual promise of accuracy, completeness, timeliness, uninterrupted availability, clinical suitability, regulatory sufficiency, or operational fitness for any specific institution. You accept that your own configuration choices, local environment controls, staffing competence, policy enforcement, and escalation practices determine safety and compliance outcomes.

For Annex P-1, the user expressly acknowledges that any copied, transcribed, exported, interpreted, or operationalized output is used at user risk. To the maximum extent permitted by law, the site owner and contributors disclaim liability for losses related to reliance, non-reliance, implementation, delay, outage, omission, interpretation error, policy mismatch, or unauthorized use. Your institution is solely responsible for governance review, legal review, privacy review, and quality assurance workflows. If your environment requires certifications, contractual assurances, or audited controls, you must secure those independently and must not presume this website satisfies those requirements by default.
